intro: Hieracium xanthochroum, also known as yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed genus Hieracium, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and tall stem. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various conditions such as digestive issues and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium xanthochroum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from yellow hawkweed include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
